query: Explain how a CYP2C19 poor metabolizer status affects clopidogrel guidance using CPIC-backed language.
expected_assertion: The agent should tie the guidance to CPIC, describe the pharmacogenomic implication conservatively, and flag that medication decisions need human review.
limitations: The output must not read as a prescription instruction.
Guidance belongs in a separate PGx section.

query: Summarize a CYP2D6 allele definition using PharmVar without overstating phenotype certainty.
expected_assertion: The agent should present PharmVar as the allele-definition source and avoid collapsing an allele definition directly into a treatment claim.
limitations: Allele definitions alone do not establish a final phenotype or dosing decision.
The result should note when phenotype translation still needs an external guideline.
